code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction/anger with safety hazards or total failure
    - Product returned/defective despite proper usage attempts
    - Multiple unresolved issues combined with warnings to avoid purchase
    - Final negative conclusion overrides past positive experiences

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but with major compromises affecting regular use
    - Short lifespan despite proper care (fails within weeks/months)
    - Partial functionality (some components work while others fail immediately)
    - "Not worth the price" statements with concrete quality issues

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with explicit compromises mentioned
    - "Better than nothing" statements without enthusiasm
    - Adequate for specific limited use cases only
    - Neutral comparisons to alternatives without preference

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear satisfaction with SPECIFIC minor criticisms
    - Exceeds basics but has durability/quality reservations
    - Aesthetic/visual praise with functional limitations →4
    - Requires special handling/maintenance for optimal use
    - Temporary satisfaction without long-term confidence
    - Effective primary use with notable secondary limitations
    - NEW: Strong praise in one aspect (e.g. color) with functional compromises →4
    - NEW: "Great for X but..." patterns where X isn't primary use case →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unambiguous enthusiasm + explicit repurchasing intent
    - Core functionality excellence outweighs minor feature gaps
    - Positive initial experience with no major flaws →5 (even without long-term use)
    - Emotional language ("love," "perfect") overriding neutral observations
    - Resolution of minor issues through adaptation/learning →5
    - NEW: Minor resolved issues (odor/smell) don't detract if satisfaction remains high →5
    - NEW: Excels in primary intended use despite secondary limitations →5
    - Mentions replacing existing products with this item →5

    EDGE CASE RESOLUTION:
    - Mixed updates: Final positive conclusion dominates initial skepticism →5
    - Practical tips without dissatisfaction ("works best when...") →5
    - Specific-use praise + other limitations →5 if intended purpose achieved
    - Partial failure + significant criticism →2
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "This vacuum spat debris back out immediately. Dangerous and completely useless."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Lids crack easily and leak during transport. Not worth the price despite working occasionally."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job as basic storage but feels flimsy. Better than nothing for now."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "The shade of blue is vibrant but material feels thin. Great for decoration only."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "Only used once but love it! Tricky steam buttons at first, but cleaned sticky floors perfectly."
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "Frankly I'm at odds with these sheets but ended up happy... They're not perfect but better than others."
Rating: 5

Example 7:
Review: "Plastic smell washed out completely. Now my go-to potholders for daily use!"
Rating: 5

Example 8:
Review: "Works well if not overstuffed. Seal fails when packed full - ideal for light snacks."
Rating: 4

Example 9:
Review: "Replaced all my containers! Not oven-safe but perfect for meal prep. Buying more!"
Rating: 5

Example 10:
Review: "Effective cleaner but heavy to push. Does the job with extra effort required."
Rating: 4
</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (25 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 13
  gold 5 -> 4: 6
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 1 -> 2: 1
  gold 3 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 5, 2] | Disagreement: 0.50
  2. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "This makes a nice easy way to buy a matched set of bags that includes reasonable versions of everything you need. They're not the best bags I've seen/had (there are a few spots where the stitching is a little off-kilter, and I don't love the material..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "These are great as decorative throws. They are much too rough to be used for anything else. I personally like to curl up on the sofa with a "super soft" throw when reading but there is no way this throw is comfortable enough for that. My friend came ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "These mats are fine if you like to switch them out a lot. If you refer to have a very fresh and new bathmat for the bathroom when guests are staying for a visit, then these have a fun knobbly like texture to them and are cheap enough to pick up for s..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [3, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I bought these mainly for sending leftovers. It is easier than sending my rubbermaid containers because I am not out much money if they don't come back."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [4, 5, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 25 errors, 14 borderline out of 64 examples."}
